search.query:
`netflow_search_rule_20367` | fillnull value="" src_vm_name src_host src_vm_zone dest_vm_name dest_host dest_vm_zone transport | search src_vm_zone="" AND dest_vm_zone!="" | search nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" gcp_exp"$gcp_exp$" (src_vm_name="$src_vm_name$" OR src_ip="$src_vm_name$") (dest_vm_name="$dest_vm_name$" OR dest_ip="$dest_vm_name$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" transport="$protocol_name$" | `dedup_timechart_events` | bucket _time $span_token$
| eval dest_host = dest_vm_name | iplocation src_ip | stats sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes by nfo_hostname,gcp_exp,src_ip,src_host,dest_ip,dest_host,transport,Country,_time

`netflow_search_rule_20367` | fillnull value="" src_vm_name src_host src_vm_zone dest_vm_name dest_host dest_vm_zone transport | search src_vm_zone!="" AND dest_vm_zone="" | search nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" gcp_exp"$gcp_exp$" (src_vm_name="$src_vm_name$" OR src_ip="$src_vm_name$") (dest_vm_name="$dest_vm_name$" OR dest_ip="$dest_vm_name$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" transport="$protocol_name$" | `dedup_timechart_events` | bucket _time $span_token$
| eval src_host = src_vm_name | iplocation dest_ip | stats sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes by nfo_hostname,gcp_exp,src_ip,src_host,dest_ip,dest_host,transport,Country,_time
| iplocation src_ip | geostats globallimit=0 sum(sumflowcount) by Country
| iplocation dest_ip | geostats globallimit=0 sum(sumflowcount) by Country

| eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname gcp_exp src_ip src_host dest_ip dest_host Country | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | sort - TrafficAmount | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | eval MaxTraffic=MaxTraffic/1000000 | eval src_host=src_ip ."/". src_host | eval dest_host= dest_ip ."/". dest_host | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, MaxTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount)` | `commas_formatting(Flow Count, Connections)`
| table gcp_exp src_host dest_host "Flow Count" "Total Traffic MB" Country | rename gcp_exp as "Project ID/VPC/Subnet" | rename src_host as "Source IP/Host" | rename dest_host as "Dest. IP/VM" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO"

| eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname gcp_exp src_ip src_host dest_ip dest_host Country | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | sort - TrafficAmount | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | eval MaxTraffic=MaxTraffic/1000000 | eval src_host=src_ip ."/". src_host | eval dest_host= dest_ip ."/". dest_host | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, MaxTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount)` | `commas_formatting(Flow Count, Connections)`
| table gcp_exp src_host dest_host "Flow Count" "Total Traffic MB" Country | rename gcp_exp as "Project ID/VPC/Subnet" | rename src_host as "Source IP/VM" | rename dest_host as "Dest. IP/Host" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10367: GCP Top Traffic Monitor” (syslogs with nfc_id=20367). This Module identifies GCP VMs with the most traffic. It consolidates VPC Flow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol. This Module is packaged in NFO “GCP VPC Flow Logs” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
